title: Smoky Fluffy American Chicken Roast
description: A juicy, smoke‑kissed chicken that’s poached in apple juice to stay moist and fluffy, then finished in the oven with a smoky spice rub for an indulgent, Whole30‑friendly roast.
instructions: Pat the chicken dry with paper towels and season the cavity with salt and pepper.
In a large, oven‑proof pot or skillet, combine apple juice, olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, pepper, and rosemary.
Place the chicken in the liquid, ensuring it’s mostly submerged; bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat.
Poach the chicken for 18–20 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 140°F (60°C).
Remove the chicken from the liquid and discard the poaching liquid; pat the surface dry.
Rub the outside of the chicken with the remaining olive oil and sprinkle the remaining spice mixture over it.
Transfer the chicken to a roasting pan or sheet pan and roast for 15–20 minutes per pound, or until the skin is crisp and the internal temperature reads 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 10 minutes before carving; serve with a side of apple‑juice glaze if desired.
